CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. Auto-fills when the Zip code is entered. Tip: Use the Copy Address to Contacts link to sync with the Contact record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Auto-fills when the Zip code is entered.
Tip: Use the Copy Address to Contacts link to sync with the Contact record.
CustomField.label: Seller's New State
